SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOMERS, THEODORE P BOONE, HEATHER B RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAU, SOPHIE DBA LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP $1,870.75 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,965.75, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR HER PREVIOUS PAYMENT IF THAT PAYMENT HAS BEEN CASHED BY PLAINTIFFS.
